theme: A Skill You Want to Learn

sentences.english: If you could learn any new skill, what would it be? Why would you want to learn that skill?
sentences.korean: 어떤 새로운 기술이든 배울 수 있다면, 무엇을 배우겠나요? 왜 그 기술을 배우고 싶나요?

sentences.english: If I could learn any new skill, I would choose to learn how to play the piano.
sentences.korean: 어떤 새로운 기술이든 배울 수 있다면, 저는 피아노 치는 법을 배우겠어요.

sentences.english: Music has always been important to me — I listen to it every day and it strongly affects my mood.
sentences.korean: 음악은 항상 저에게 중요했어요 — 매일 듣고, 기분에 강하게 영향을 미쳐요.

sentences.english: However, I've never learned to create it myself, and I feel like I'm only experiencing half of what music can offer.
sentences.korean: 하지만, 직접 만드는 법은 배운 적이 없고, 음악이 줄 수 있는 것의 절반만 경험하고 있는 것 같아요.

sentences.english: Learning the piano would allow me to express emotions that are sometimes hard to put into words.
sentences.korean: 피아노를 배우면 때로 말로 표현하기 어려운 감정들을 표현할 수 있을 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Skill You Want to Learn
Studying Alone vs. Studying in a Group
A Person Who Has Influenced You

theme: A Skill You Want to Learn

sentences.english: I also think it would be a great stress-relief activity.
sentences.korean: 또한 훌륭한 스트레스 해소 활동이 될 거라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: Studies show that playing a musical instrument reduces anxiety and improves cognitive function.
sentences.korean: 연구에 따르면 악기를 연주하면 불안이 줄고 인지 기능이 향상된대요.

sentences.english: Even if I never perform for an audience, playing for myself at the end of a long day sounds incredibly satisfying.
sentences.korean: 관객 앞에서 연주하지 않더라도, 긴 하루 끝에 혼자 연주하는 것은 엄청나게 만족스러울 것 같아요.

sentences.english: It's a skill I've always admired in others and regretted not pursuing earlier.
sentences.korean: 다른 사람들에게서 항상 감탄해왔고, 더 일찍 시작하지 않은 것을 후회하는 기술이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Skill You Want to Learn
A Person Who Has Influenced You
